_comment: Programs landing page copy and pathway cards. Card order matches the public program grid.

hero.title: Who's to Say What's Possible?
hero.subtitle: Interest-driven pathways that help people build confidence, skills, and community through clear projects

gridHeading.title: The Possibility Paths
gridHeading.subtitle: Each pathway starts with interest, then gets scoped as a creative project, public workshop, mission opportunity, partner service, or separate support lane.

programs.label: Digital Path
programs.title: Digital Content Creator Pathways
programs.summary: Video, design, photography, and production skills built through defined creative projects.

programs.label: Sports Path
programs.title: Who's to Say Sports Media
programs.summary: Sports storytelling, fan interviews, recaps, photography, and team-story media.

programs.label: Independence Path
programs.title: Life Skills & Independent Living
programs.summary: Everyday independence goals routed through the proper service or mission lane.

programs.label: Community Path
programs.title: Community Leadership & Storytelling
programs.summary: Creative advocacy, storytelling, and presentation projects with direct support separated when needed.

programs.label: Art Path
programs.title: Art Studio & Showcase Projects
programs.summary: Create, present, and celebrate participant-owned creative work with clear consent and showcase terms.

programs.label: Entertainment Path
programs.title: Entertainment & On-Camera Projects
programs.summary: On-camera confidence, voice work, fandom, and mini-reel projects.

howPathways.title: How Pathways Work
howPathways.subtitle: Flexible paths for building confidence and independence.

steps.title: Choose
steps.body: Start with what excites you — interests lead the way.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: Grow skills, routines, and confidence through real projects.

steps.title: Expand
steps.body: Paths can overlap and evolve toward work, community, and independence.
